testcases.name: SJV-EAAN-1
testcases.description: Malformed JWT because vct#integrity claim is missing

testcases.name: SJV-EAAN-2
testcases.description: Duplicate JSON keys and conflicting values

testcases.name: SJV-EAAN-3
testcases.description: EAA doesn't incorporate technical validity period

testcases.name: SJV-EAAN-4
testcases.description: EAA incorporates both the EAA short-lived component and the EAA status service.

testcases.name: SJV-EAAN-5
testcases.description: Tampered payload – invalid signature, valid token modified after signing altering a claim

testcases.name: SJV-EAAN-6
testcases.description: Malformed JWT including wrong elements (wrong typ value)

testcases.name: SJV-EAAN-7
testcases.description: Expired credential, credential has expired in the past.

testcases.name: SJV-EAAN-8
testcases.description: Status check unavailable (fail-open vs fail-closed), status service returns 5xx or network outage.

testcases.name: SJV-EAAN-9
testcases.description: Malformed JWT including wrong elements (wrong field name in payload)

testcases.name: SJV-EAAN-10
testcases.description:
JWT – Schema/namespace mismatch, verifier expects a specific schema/namespace; credential uses different one.
1) Present credential with wrong schema identifier or namespace.
2) Verify schema validation behavior.

testcases.name: SJV-EAAN-11
testcases.description: EAA with a disclosure without having the corresponding digest in the payload. The disclosure may be an object or an element of an array.

testcases.name: SJV-EAAN-12
testcases.description: EAA with some mandatory PID elements not present

testcases.name: SJV-QEAAN-1
testcases.description:
Mandatory elements, without selective disclosures; without key binding; with wrong EAA category that's different from
- urn:etsi:esi:eaa:eu:qualified (QEAA)
- urn:etsi:esi:eaa:eu:pub (Pub-EAA)

testcases.name: SJV-QEAAN-2
testcases.description: Mandatory elements, without selective disclosures; with the issuer identifier fields including an identifier of a non-EU Member State

testcases.name: SJV-QEAAN-3
testcases.description: Mandatory elements, without selective disclosures; without the issuer identifier fields

testcases.name: SJV-QEAAN-4
testcases.description:
Mandatory elements, without selective disclosures; 
without including either the EAA subject identifier or the pseudonym of the EAA subject.

testcases.name: SJV-QEAAN-5
SJV-QEAAN-6

without including either the EAA subject identifier or the pseudonym of the EAA subject.
